# ParallelThresholdCalibration { #astroapers.ParallelThresholdCalibration }

```python
ParallelThresholdCalibration(
    threshold,
    original_threshold,
    applied,
    counts,
    serial_seconds,
    parallel_seconds,
)
```

Result from calibrating the Rayon parallelization threshold.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

<code>[**threshold**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [int]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Recommended aperture-count threshold for switching to Rayon.

<code>[**original_threshold**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [int]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Threshold value active before calibration started.

<code>[**applied**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [bool]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Whether ``threshold`` was applied to the current Python process.

<code>[**counts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [tuple\[int, ...\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Aperture counts tested during calibration.

<code>[**serial_seconds, parallel_seconds**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [tuple\[float, ...\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Best measured runtime for each count with serial and forced-parallel execution.
